LearningEvent.description:
The fingerprint mutation a review produced (spec §5.7, §14.2).
Append-only; formula inputs are recorded exactly (as strings) so the
write-back is reproducible from the event log alone (REQ-027).
LearningEvent.title: LearningEvent

PrioritizedSuiteEntry.description:
One row of the prioritized suite view (spec §12.2, CLI_SPEC `suite`).

Disabled rules stay in their priority position, marked skipped:disabled.
priority_score is exact Decimal arithmetic so the suite is reproducible
byte-for-byte (REQ-009).
PrioritizedSuiteEntry.title: PrioritizedSuiteEntry

ReferentialParams.description: Empty params = plain bidirectional orphan detection on join_keys.
ReferentialParams.title: ReferentialParams

ReviewAccepted.description: Mirrors the spec §18.2 sample response for POST review.
ReviewAccepted.title: ReviewAccepted

SuiteItem.description: One entry of a run's immutable suite snapshot (spec §12.2).
SuiteItem.title: SuiteItem

ValidityCheck.description:
Single-sided validity constraint (spec §11.2.1 ``validity`` block).

``min``/``max`` are strings parsed at execution time: an ISO date or a
decimal amount; ``max`` additionally accepts the literal ``"today"``.
``gte_field`` requires this field's value >= the named field's value
(cross-field comparison, e.g. term_date >= hire_date).
ValidityCheck.title: ValidityCheck

info.description: Targeted, not generic: prioritized plan-conversion validation driven by the platform pair's Migration Fingerprint. POC layer — no authentication (product adds Cognito role scopes, spec §18.4); runs execute synchronously in-process (product enqueues to SQS).
info.title: MAPTIVA Migration Fingerprint API

schema.title: Response Get Learning History Fingerprints  Pair Id  Learning History Get
Response Get Pairs Platform Pairs Get
Response Get Findings Runs  Run Id  Findings Get
